//: Tailscale ACL policy for homelab.
Upload this file to https://login.tailscale.com/admin/acls
before running task ansible:tailscale:configure.
Tags:
tag:homelab-server  — all cluster nodes (cody-X570, giant, imac, mini)
tag:homelab-router  — reserved for OPNsense firewall (add when ready)
Access model:
- Only the account owner (autogroup:admin) can reach homelab nodes.
- Homelab nodes cannot initiate connections to each other via Tailscale.
- Homelab nodes cannot reach personal devices via Tailscale.
- OPNsense (tag:homelab-router) can reach all nodes when added.
Ports exposed per node:
22   — SSH
80   — HTTP (Traefik redirect)
443  — HTTPS (Traefik)
5380 — Technitium DNS admin (manager node only)
To add OPNsense later:
1. Install the Tailscale plugin on OPNsense.
2. Tag it as tag:homelab-router in the Tailscale admin console.
3. Uncomment the router ACL entry below.
4. Set TAILSCALE_ADVERTISE_ROUTES= (empty) on all Linux nodes.
5. Configure subnet routing on OPNsense instead.

acls.//: Account owner can reach all homelab nodes on specified ports
OPNsense router can reach all cluster nodes
